vocab.meaning: học cách làm một công việc/hoạt động mới
vocab.example: Joining the local cricket club was a challenge, but the senior players helped me learn the ropes quickly.

vocab.meaning: người có tinh thần đồng đội, hợp tác tốt
vocab.example: Being part of a basketball team taught me how to be a team player rather than just focusing on individual glory.
Even when we were losing by twenty points, our captain urged us never to throw in the towel.

vocab.word: the ball is in your court
vocab.meaning: đến lượt bạn đưa ra quyết định/hành động
vocab.example: Once the coach gave me the strategy, the ball was in my court to execute the play during the final minutes.

vocab.meaning: thắng một cách dễ dàng, thuyết phục
vocab.example: Our school's volleyball team was so well-coordinated that we managed to win the regional finals hands down.

vocab.meaning: làm tròn phần việc của mình, đóng góp công sức công bằng
vocab.example: In a sports team, everyone has to pull their weight if the group wants to achieve a podium finish.

vocab.word: take the bull by the horns
vocab.meaning: quyết đoán giải quyết một tình huống khó khăn
vocab.example: I decided to take the bull by the horns and volunteered to be the goalkeeper when our main one got injured.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí quan trọng nhất, trở thành tâm điểm
vocab.example: In my university days, sports were front and center in my life, and being on the rowing team was my proudest achievement.

vocab.meaning: chỉ huy, đưa ra những quyết định quan trọng
vocab.example: As the point guard, I was responsible for calling the shots and directing my teammates on the floor.
We didn't win the championship, but I'm proud that every member of the team gave it their best shot.
